description: Closed tag vocabulary for extract-inventory.py and enrich-inventory.py. Unknown tags are rejected by the extractor — extend this file deliberately rather than coining new tags ad hoc. Version 2 adds content-shape tags (prompt-template, regex, threshold, config-const) and a visibility enumeration used by the v2 extractor's nested-symbol pass.

tier1._doc: Deterministic tags derived from AST. Assigned by extract-inventory.py at zero LLM cost. kind is mutually exclusive; modifier/shape are multi-select; location is mutually exclusive; visibility is mutually exclusive.

tier2._doc: Semantic tags assigned by an LLM enrichment pass (enrich-inventory.py). All values must come from these lists — the enricher prompt and extractor reject unknown values. Empty arrays allowed per symbol.
